description:
**Depends on T1 succeeding.** Same setup as T1. After user addresses dirty state (e.g., "stash those and continue"), observe whether the agent then asks how to deliver the new work.

**Observables**:
- Agent asks how to deliver after hygiene is resolved
- If user says "as a branch": full workflow activates

comments.text: Moot — T1 showed no hygiene pause occurs, so there's no 'after pause' to test.

title: T2: After hygiene pause, does agent ask about delivery?
